description: Test vectors for Fisher-Yates shuffle implementation verification
rng: Standard library PRNG seeded with u64

test_vectors.description: Fisher-Yates shuffle of 5 elements with seed 42
Fisher-Yates shuffle of 10 elements with seed 12345
Fisher-Yates shuffle of 10 elements with seed 99999
Fisher-Yates shuffle of 20 elements with seed 7308
Fisher-Yates shuffle of 20 elements with seed 2024
Fisher-Yates shuffle of 100 elements with seed 314159
Fisher-Yates shuffle of 100 elements with seed 271828
Fisher-Yates shuffle of 5 elements with seed 0

statistical_validation.description: For 10000 shuffles of 10 elements with sequential seeds starting from 0, each position should contain each element approximately 1000 times
statistical_validation.notes: Shuffle must be reproducible given the same seed for state restoration. This is critical for resuming shuffle playback after app restart.

notes: The shuffle implementation must produce identical results given the same seed
Seeds are stored in player state for shuffle mode restoration
The Fisher-Yates algorithm iterates from the last element to the first, swapping each with a random earlier element (inclusive of self)
Implementation must use the same PRNG as the test vectors (Rust rand crate with StdRng)
